official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing and encoding the Play clientbound set_cursor_item empty ItemStack fixture.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and set_cursor_item packet id.

field_notes.item: Empty ItemStack fixture only. Official ItemStack optional codec writes VarInt count 0, avoiding item registry and component patch bytes.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound set_cursor_item packet framing and dispatch/decode for ItemStack.EMPTY only; do not infer non-empty ItemStack, item registry, component patch, inventory UI, or client-load completion.
